thoughts.label: SAFE MODE — MORNING ENGINE RUN MISSED AGAIN
thoughts.text: The latest signal_matrix.json is the 2026-06-29 16:17 PDT (close+AH) run; this morning's 5:50 AM Signal Engine run did not fire. At this 6:00 AM Daily Brief the matrix is ~13.7h old — far over the §2.5 3-hour limit. CLU is in SAFE MODE: no new entries, manage existing positions only. This is the engine's third consecutive scheduled miss (5:50 AM + 3:20 PM yesterday, 5:50 AM today). Workflow cron/runner reliability remains the top operational flag.

thoughts.label: RECONCILED — 6 POSITIONS, GAP CHECK CLEAR
thoughts.text: Broker holdings (INTC, ARKK, NVDA LAB + VOO, QQQ, SOXX CORE) match memory exactly. Pre-open gap check on the LAB sleeve is CLEAR: premarket INTC $130.50 (+16.5% above stop), ARKK $80.00 (+9.1%), NVDA $195.88 (+3.1%). Cash $36.37 unchanged — no new deposit (pending_deposits $0). CORE carries no stops (§13).

thoughts.label: MISSING CLOSE+AH MATRIX RECOVERED — COMPOSITES FIRMED
thoughts.text: The 16:17 PDT matrix is the close+AH data yesterday's After-Hours session never received. Off Monday's lows several names firmed: NVDA composite -0.412 → -0.29 (back to NEUTRAL), INTC gate is 5/5 again (composite 0.002), MU lifted to 4/5. The tape is still broadly NEUTRAL (-0.1 to -0.3) with no decisive directional edge — but it is no longer deteriorating.

thoughts.label: NO TRADES — HOLD CASH
thoughts.text: Four independent blocks converge on zero trades: (1) SAFE MODE forbids new entries on a stale matrix; (2) no deposit detected, so no deposit-routing; (3) DRIP — the most-underweight tier (0% vs 30%) — is still gated on dividend-data completeness; (4) LAB at 25.6% is over its 20% staging cap, and §17.3 forbids force-selling to rebalance. The $36.37 cash is held for the next DRIP seed once data and matrix are both clean.

thoughts.label: DIVIDEND DATA PARTIALLY RECOVERED — STILL UNVERIFIABLE
thoughts.text: The dividend engine now emits sane yields (SCHD 3.28%, JEPI 8.12%, JEPQ 10.08%) — the >100% anomaly is gone — but dividend_growth_streak still reads 0 and payout_ratio is null for every DRIP name, so the §15.3 screen (streak>=5, payout<80%) cannot be confirmed. Notably JEPI/JEPQ go ex-dividend tomorrow (2026-07-01); were SAFE MODE lifted and the screen verifiable, that proximity would favor a covered-call seed. Deferred.

learned_patterns.pattern: The Signal Engine has now missed three consecutive scheduled runs (5:50 AM + 3:20 PM yesterday, 5:50 AM today). The §2.5 guard keeps forcing correct SAFE MODE, but back-to-back misses mean consecutive sessions can take no new action. Workflow cron/runner reliability is the root cause to fix before the book can trade on signal.

The recovered close+AH matrix firmed momentum off Monday's lows: NVDA -0.412 → -0.29, INTC back to a 5/5 gate, MU to 4/5. Composites are mean-reverting upward but the whole tape remains NEUTRAL (-0.1 to -0.3) — directionless, not bullish.

An over-weight tier blocks new entries into it even on a passing gate: LAB at 25.6% > 20% cap means MU's 4/5 and RXRX's 3/5 do not authorize an add, because §17.3 forbids force-selling to rebalance. Over-weight sleeves dilute via base growth, not trimming.

The dividend engine half-recovered: yields are now sane (the >100% bug is gone) but dividend_growth_streak=0 and payout_ratio=null persist, so the §15.3 screen still can't be fully verified. DRIP build is gated on data completeness, not just allocation math.

JEPI and JEPQ go ex-dividend 2026-07-01 (tomorrow). §15.3 prefers adds >=3 trading days before ex-date — so the ideal capture window has already passed for this cycle even absent the SAFE-MODE/data blocks. Ex-date proximity is a planning input, not an override.
